replies.author: @telldpablo
replies.text: I couldn’t agree more. I’ve watched the videos on copper plating and never seen how this version is made. Not having a background in chemistry makes reproduction virtually impossible for the simple layman. So yes for some, maybe most a how to / recipe is what’s really needed. Please consider sharing, or directing us to where we can find the rest of this very tantalizing mystery. Thanks in advance.

author: @charlottemoorthy
text: Please please share the recipe for your Stainless Steel coppering gel. I would love to turn my stainless steel sink to copper and am having difficulty figuring out how to make the gel. Thank you!!

author: @World_Theory
text:
This is magic. You people have made a magic potion. No longer are you muggles, for you have transcended that mundane state of being.

Anyway, I was watching a video or two from this channel, made sometime during 2013, and I am really glad you got a better camera. The 720p version looked to be of the same visual quality as the 240p version. Though I wonder if it was not actually a bad camera, but instead, that it was compressing the video data too aggressively.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: could be - quality has improved over time

Can you send me the link for both of these items please

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Mike Holdom I am afraid we don't sell them mate - you have to make them yourself - but the recipes and how to are on the previous videos - adhesion is superb - watch the soldering  wire video - which uses the gel to create a copper pad for soldering copper to stainless steel
